currentChartValues.primary_reason_for_home_health_medical_n: Following a left total knee replacement surgery scheduled for April 2, 2026. Primary diagnosis is osteoarthritis of the left knee, necessitating surgical intervention. Patient is homebound due to post-surgery, experiencing significant functional limitations, including reduced mobility, pain management needs, and the necessity for assistance with activities of daily living (ADLs).
currentChartValues.homebound_narrative: Patient is homebound due to status post left total knee replacement and assistance needed for safe mobility and transfer. High risk for fall and injury.
currentChartValues.pain_assessment_narrative: Patient reports 7/10 pain at left knee. Pain is constant and throbbing, affecting quality of life and day-to-day activities.
